name: Aptos, LLC.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Aptos operate in India?
faq.a: Aptos operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Aptos have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Aptos's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Aptos run in India?
faq.a: Aptos runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Aptos's India GCCs?
faq.a: Aptos's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Aptos's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 5 leaders at Aptos's India centers, across IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
